title: phebalium glandulosum subsp. nitidum
intro: Phebalium glandulosum subsp. nitidum, also known as the Yellow Peppermint Bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as reducing stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, Phebalium glandulosum subsp. nitidum is often used in teas, infusions, and essential oil blends, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
